content:
A simple guide and showcase video so new players can get a grasp of Mouchette's best builds and play patterns.
https://youtu.be/uhEL0PgGhwY

embeds.title: A Beginner's Guide to DPS: Mouchette, The Striker
embeds.description:
This is meant to be a new player guide to the newest Morimens DPS: Mouchette
Topics covered:
Everything you need to know to perform with her at a high level.
